title: Automations build access is restricted, yet Im an owner
excerpt: I am a workspace owner and and board owner, yet I cannot create an automation. I have enterprise edition. what am I doing wrong? I have many boards on my workspace, do I need to be an owner of all to work?

posts.author: SMECH (Stephanie Mech)
posts.cookedHtml: I am a workspace owner and and board owner, yet I cannot create an automation. I have enterprise edition. what am I doing wrong? I have many boards on my workspace, do I need to be an owner of all to work?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Stephanie! This could be due to the permissions settings set by the Admin. If you are not an Admin yourself, can you have them check to make sure you’re enabled to set up automations? Had you set one up before?
